title: geography — compliance evidence
description: IP-to-location is personal data (GDPR Art. 4(1)). The vendor's ip-api.com fallback is a subprocessor. MaxMind GeoLite2 is a locally-executing binary DB (no data leaves the app) so not a subprocessor.

controls.evidence: IP is only used as a cache key for the geolocate cache. Never persisted to durable storage in the same row as user_id or workspace_id.
GeolocationData only carries country_code / state_code / city_name / coarse latitude+longitude — no fine coordinates. accuracy_radius (meters) surfaces the precision floor from the vendor.
ip-api.com is engaged only on MaxMind cache miss. Workspaces on EU-hosted plans can force MaxMind-only mode via config.
MaxMind DB runs locally (no transfer). ip-api.com traffic is HTTPS + no personal data beyond the IP itself; DPA on file.
MaxMind DB freshness health probe + weekly auto-refresh.
